Job description

SeeWriteHear is actively seeking a skilled and experienced mid-level Software Developer to join our technology division. The ideal candidate will have a strong grasp of modern approaches to front and back-end software development, as well as experience with desktop, web, and service application development. The mid-level Software Developer will be responsible for rapidly onboarding to existing projects, developing and maintaining software that supports our accessible media conversion pipeline, and providing leadership and guidance to the Technology team.
